title: Brain Health: The Missing Pillar of Europe’s Competitiveness and Wellbeing Economy [Promoted Content]
summary_full: This week marks Brain Awareness Week (16-22 March), dedicated to increasing public awareness of the progress and benefits of brain research. As health leaders and policymakers gather at the European Parliament for Brain Health Day, they’re focusing on a sobering reality: for the millions of Europeans navigating the daily challenges of brain disorders, every month […]
